name: cultivagent
description: Personal agent hook and token usage monitor.

scripts.worker:dev: npm run worker:prepare && npx wrangler dev
scripts.worker:deploy: npm run worker:prepare && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.worker:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply cultivagent --local
scripts.worker:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply cultivagent --remote
